analysis:
Based on your portfolio analysis:

**Best CSP:**
NVDA $185 strike, 2026-06-05, 34 DTE, $4.70/$4.85, delta 0.27, 27.7% annualized return

**Best Position Income CC:**
GOOGL $400 strike, 2026-06-18, 47 DTE, $11.60/$11.80, delta 0.39, 23.6% annualized return

**Best LEAPS:**
MSFT $195 strike, 2028-01-21, 629 DTE, $230.00/$234.50, delta 0.99, 5.4% extrinsic (excellent minimal time decay, mixed timing due to high IVP but oversold position)

**Bull Call Spreads:**
None qualifying

**IVP Environment:**
Mixed volatility regime - MSFT (91%) and GOOGL (100%) showing extreme fear, while IBIT (19%) signals complacency. Quality names like NVDA/AAPL showing elevated but workable IVP around 60%.
